method: Grouped bar chart with DNO on x-axis, grouped by Appt_Type (primary/secondary), and count on y-axis. Color distinguishes appointment types. Implement sort by secondary count to highlight interdisciplinary departments.
objective: Reveal departmental staffing structures and cross-department collaboration patterns via primary vs secondary affiliations

method: Stacked bar chart per department (DName on x-axis) showing faculty rank distribution (Professor/AsstProf/etc.). Color encodes ranks. Interaction: Clicking a rank highlights its proportion in department course offerings (via linked V1 visualization).
objective: Analyze academic hierarchy distribution across departments and link seniority to teaching/research roles

method: Scatterplot comparing faculty count (x: Count of primary Faculty per DNO) vs courses offered (y: Count of CID per DNO). Size encodes student enrollments. Highlight 500-level department clusters.
objective: Identify correlations between faculty staffing levels and academic activity intensity in departments

method: Small multiples of pie charts (one per department) showing gender ratio. Annotate departments with >90% male faculty. Tooltip shows exact counts.
objective: Assess gender diversity across departments and identify potential imbalance areas

method: Histogram showing course count per faculty rank. Box plot overlay displays teaching load distribution. Filter by department via linked views.
objective: Evaluate teaching load equity across academic ranks and identify overburdened roles

method: Matrix heatmap comparing faculty office buildings (rows) vs department locations (columns). Red highlights mismatched pairs (e.g., faculty in Barton but department in Krieger).
objective: Detect atypical faculty-department physical location assignments for space optimization
